macos.notes: Manually curated against official OpenClaw installer/docs during host IOC review; expanded macOS path coverage and removed repo-code symbols that were previously misclassified as IOC values.

research.notes: Personal AI assistant; can speak/listen on macOS; recommended macOS CLI wizard and daemon install; releases mention macOS app/chat UI and onboarding fixes. Manually reviewed IOC set keeps official domains (openclaw.ai, docs.openclaw.ai) plus verified macOS host paths such as /Applications/OpenClaw.app, /usr/local/bin/openclaw, /opt/homebrew/bin/openclaw, ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json, and ~/Library/Logs/OpenClaw/diagnostics.jsonl.
research.evidence_summary: Personal AI assistant; can speak/listen on macOS; recommended macOS CLI wizard and daemon install; releases mention macOS app/chat UI and onboarding fixes.

scoring.notes: Calibrated on 2026-03-16 from claw-agent CSV seed URLs plus repo/site IOC scan; max_score=19.0, high_precision_signals=1, provider_weight=0, host_weight=10.9, file_weight=0.
